name: Marcos Solomon
tagline: Designing secure, scalable systems that businesses can rely on.
bio: Leads system architecture and visual brand through graphic design.
story: Marcos Solomon leads the system architecture and security engineering at Brivemarc Technologies. His work focuses on designing scalable backend systems that can handle real-world demand while maintaining strict security standards. He has built and structured systems from the ground up, ensuring that every layer, from database design to API architecture is optimized for performance and resilience. Marcos approaches every project with a security-first mindset, integrating best practices early rather than treating security as an afterthought. Beyond infrastructure, he plays a key role in shaping how systems evolve over time, ensuring they remain maintainable, scalable, and aligned with business growth. His philosophy is simple: systems should not just work, they should remain reliable, secure, and scalable under pressure.
notableWork: Designed scalable backend for Solora Market system
Implemented security layer reducing vulnerabilities by 97%

name: Evans Kariuki
bio: Builds scalable backend systems and connected IoT solutions.
story: Evans focuses on backend infrastructure and IoT integrations, enabling seamless communication between systems and devices.

name: Muola Veronica
bio: Oversees design, cybersecurity, and customer experience strategy.
story: Veronica leads the design vision and ensures that every product is both secure and intuitive. She blends creativity with technical precision.

name: Brighton Wandera
role: Android Dev, AI Engineer & Frontend Developer
bio: AI-focused developer building intelligent, high-performance user interfaces and android applications.
story: Brighton specializes in building intelligent systems that merge AI with real-world applications. His work focuses on performance, scalability, and user-centric design.
